evals.prompt: /storytelling ช่วยทำ slide เรื่อง digital transformation ของ IFCG ให้ board อนุมัติงบ 5 ล้าน นำเสนอ 15 นาที สีน้ำเงินเข้มของบริษัท
evals.expected_output: storytelling.json with ~12 slides, pitch storyline, assertion headlines, per-slide prompts for gslide, speaker scripts with transitions

assertions.text: Output is valid JSON that can be parsed
JSON contains a 'presentation' object with at minimum: topic, audience, goal, one_big_idea, storyline, color_palette
JSON contains a non-empty 'slides' array
Slide count is 8-15 (reasonable for 15 min presentation at ~1-2 min/slide)
Every slide has a 'headline' that is a complete sentence (not just a topic word or phrase) — at least 5 words per headline
Every slide has a non-empty 'prompt' field containing generation instructions for gslide
Every prompt mentions a specific layout pattern (e.g., split, timeline, centered, cards, full-bleed, grid, hub, funnel)
Every prompt mentions a visual style (e.g., flat vector, isometric, corporate, minimal, clean)
Every slide has a 'script' or speaker notes field with at least 30 words
At least 80% of slides have transition_in and transition_out fields
Slides collectively cover beginning (opening/problem), middle (evidence/solution), and end (reward/CTA) — story_role or type fields span the full arc
At least some slides have sparkline_position values showing alternation between what_is and what_could_be (appropriate for pitch storyline)

evals.prompt: /storytelling ผมมีเนื้อหาจาก NotebookLM เรื่อง กลยุทธ์ฟื้นฟู IFCG สร้างทีมขายใหม่ อยากทำ presentation สอนพนักงานใหม่ 20 คน ประมาณ 10 นาที ไม่ต้อง formal มาก
evals.expected_output: storytelling.json with ~10 slides, explanation storyline, casual tone, progressive complexity, assertion headlines, speaker scripts

assertions.text: Output is valid JSON that can be parsed
JSON contains a 'presentation' object with at minimum: topic, audience, goal, one_big_idea, storyline, color_palette
JSON contains a non-empty 'slides' array
Slide count is 6-12 (reasonable for 10 min presentation)
Every slide has a 'headline' that is a complete sentence — at least 5 words per headline
Every slide has a non-empty 'prompt' field
Every prompt mentions a specific layout pattern
Every prompt mentions a visual style
Every slide has a 'script' field with at least 30 words
At least 80% of slides have transition_in and transition_out fields
The storyline type is 'explanation' (not pitch) and slides show progressive complexity — simpler concepts before complex ones
The tone field is casual/friendly (not formal) and scripts use approachable language

evals.prompt: /storytelling ต้อง present ให้ลูกค้า 5 นาที เรื่อง Glu+Me แอป AI สำหรับ รพ.สต. ลูกค้าเป็นหมอและพยาบาลที่ไม่ค่อยเก่งเทค อยากให้เขา pilot ใช้งาน
evals.expected_output: storytelling.json with ~5-7 slides, pitch storyline, simple language, concrete examples, healthcare-friendly visuals, clear CTA for pilot signup

assertions.text: Output is valid JSON that can be parsed
JSON contains a 'presentation' object with topic, audience, goal, one_big_idea, storyline, color_palette
JSON contains a non-empty 'slides' array
Slide count is 4-8 (reasonable for 5 min presentation)
Every slide has a 'headline' that is a complete sentence — at least 5 words
Every slide has a non-empty 'prompt' field
Every prompt mentions a specific layout pattern
Every prompt mentions a visual style
Every slide has a 'script' field with at least 30 words
The last content slide has a clear call to action mentioning pilot signup or trial
Scripts and headlines use simple, non-technical language appropriate for healthcare workers who are not tech-savvy
At least one slide presents concrete, specific benefits (e.g., time saved percentage, reduced workload) rather than vague claims
